request.prompt: Create one classroom-safe educational image about Modes of Nutrition: Autotrophs vs Heterotrophs. Subject: Science (086). Grade level: Class X / 10. Topic focus: Nutrition. Must show visually: Autotrophic Nutrition; Heterotrophic Nutrition. Visual goal: Comparison of nutrition types. Teaching context: Introduce the two modes of nutrition.. Student takeaway: Plants make food; animals consume it.. Show the scientific or educational concept itself, not a presentation slide about the concept. Do not draw a slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, classroom poster, infographic, worksheet, UI card, or presentation layout. Do not include any words, letters, labels, headings, captions, bullets, equations, watermarks, or decorative interface chrome inside the image. Use a clean single-scene composition with one clear focal concept, presentation-quality lighting, and an uncluttered background.
request.negativePrompt: text, labels, captions, numbers, watermark, decorative clutter, formula text, axis labels, diagram callouts, presentation slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, poster layout, infographic layout, ui card, worksheet, powerpoint slide, presentation template
